sections.paragraph:
Original: חגג

Transliteration: châgag

Phonetic: khaw-gag'

BDB Definition:

  1. to hold a feast, hold a festival, make pilgrimage, keep a pilgrim-feast, celebrate, dance, stagger
    1. (Qal)
      1. to keep a pilgrim-feast
      2. to reel

Origin: a primitive root [compare H2283, H2328]

TWOT entry: 602

Part(s) of speech: Verb
